expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Deliver notification center behavior.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Persist notification read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want read state persisted so notification state survives sessions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification persistence stores read or unread state.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/add_notification_read_state.sql"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Render notification list and unread badge",
      "description": "As a user, I want notification list and unread badge so updates are visible.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "UI renders unread badge and notification list.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/notifications/NotificationCenterPanel.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Mark notification read or unread",
      "description": "As a user, I want mark read or unread so I can manage notification state.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Server logic updates read state for notification.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/actions/markNotificationReadState.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Filter notifications by read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want filter by read state so I can focus unread messages.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification filter supports all, unread, and read values.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/notifications/NotificationFilters.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Clear all read notifications",
      "description": "As a user, I want clear all read notifications so only active items remain.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Clear action removes or archives notifications in read state.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/actions/clearReadNotifications.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
